raw:
ISSUES:
- [severity:critical] /Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/resources/static/css/sass/index/_index_style.scss:166 - Corrupted media query header: "@KiiPS-UI/target/classes/static/img/icon_filetype_media.svg" is used instead of "@media", which will cause a Sass compilation error and break the build.
- [severity:warning] /Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/resources/static/css/sass/index/_index_style.scss:182 - Brittle responsive layout: .mmyy p:first-child uses a large negative margin (-86px) in the mobile/narrow view, which is likely a hack and may cause overlapping issues if surrounding content changes.
- [severity:info] /Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/resources/static/css/sass/index/_index_style.scss:5 - Existing misspelling in class name ".dashbooard_container" (triple 'o') should be verified against JSP usage before any future refactoring.

VERDICT: needs-attention
SUMMARY: The change introduces a critical syntax error by replacing a media query rule with an SVG file path, alongside a suspicious negative margin for responsive positioning.

issues.text: /Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/resources/static/css/sass/index/_index_style.scss:166 - Corrupted media query header: "@KiiPS-UI/target/classes/static/img/icon_filetype_media.svg" is used instead of "@media", which will cause a Sass compilation error and break the build.

/Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/resources/static/css/sass/index/_index_style.scss:182 - Brittle responsive layout: .mmyy p:first-child uses a large negative margin (-86px) in the mobile/narrow view, which is likely a hack and may cause overlapping issues if surrounding content changes.

/Users/younghwankang/WORK/WORKSPACE/KiiPS/KiiPS-UI/src/main/resources/static/css/sass/index/_index_style.scss:5 - Existing misspelling in class name ".dashbooard_container" (triple 'o') should be verified against JSP usage before any future refactoring.

summary: The change introduces a critical syntax error by replacing a media query rule with an SVG file path, alongside a suspicious negative margin for responsive positioning.
